# List open files
lsof

# Display resource limits
ulimit -a

# Redirect standard output to a file
echo "Linux File I/O" > output_test.txt

# Generate an error and redirect stderr to a file
ls /does/not/exist 2> error_test.txt

# Redirect both stdout and stderr to the same file
(ls . && ls /does/not/exist) > combined_test.txt 2>&1

# Display the contents of the generated files
cat output_test.txt
cat error_test.txt
cat combined_test.txt
